overview.description: The Amplify HYG High Yield 10% Target Income ETF (HYGM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is a passively managed ETF that tracks an index aiming to receive a targeted annualized income of 10% through investments in the HYG ETF and selling one-week expiration, at-the-money call option contracts. HYGM was launched on Apr 20, 2026 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
infoTable: Bloomberg U.S. High Yield Corporate Bond 10% Income Covered Call Index
